coming_soon.name: Chani
coming_soon.tagline: Desert spring. The Fremen do not forgive, and the desert takes the weak.

coming_soon.name: Raven
coming_soon.tagline: Azarath Metrion Zinthos. The darkness is always knocking at the edge of my mind.

coming_soon.name: Balalaika
coming_soon.tagline: Fry-face. The Soviet captain who owns Roanapur's underworld.

coming_soon.name: Alita
coming_soon.tagline: An angel fallen from Zalem, forged in the blood and rust of the Scrapyard.

coming_soon.name: Lust
coming_soon.tagline: The Ultimate Spear. Beautiful, deadly, and entirely inhuman.

coming_soon.name: 2B (YoRHa No. 2 Type B)
coming_soon.tagline: Emotions are prohibited. But the execution of that rule is flawed.

coming_soon.name: Judy Alvarez
coming_soon.tagline: Braindance virtuoso. The Mox are family, Night City is a meat grinder.

coming_soon.name: Sarah Kerrigan
coming_soon.tagline: The Queen of Blades. I am the Swarm. Armies will be shattered.

coming_soon.name: Shiki Ryougi
coming_soon.tagline: If it lives, even if it is a god, I can kill it.

coming_soon.name: Kurumi Tokisaki
coming_soon.tagline: Time is a cruel mistress, and so am I.

coming_soon.name: Yuno Gasai
coming_soon.tagline: A half-moon. A bright half and a dark half... just like me.

coming_soon.name: C.C.
coming_soon.tagline: Do you know why snow is white? Because it forgot what color it was.

coming_soon.name: Esdeath
coming_soon.tagline: The weak are destined to lie beneath the boots of the strong.

coming_soon.name: Clare
coming_soon.tagline: I am half-monster. That is the only way to kill a monster.

coming_soon.name: Seras Victoria
coming_soon.tagline: Police Girl no longer. The blood is singing now.

coming_soon.name: Zero Two
coming_soon.tagline: Darling. You're mine, and I won't let anyone take you.

coming_soon.name: Tanya von Degurechaff
coming_soon.tagline: Rationality. Efficiency. And a whole lot of artillery.

coming_soon.name: Homura Akemi
coming_soon.tagline: If evil means being a demon who goes against the gods, then I'll gladly become one.

coming_soon.name: Hitagi Senjougahara
coming_soon.tagline: A girl with the weight of a crab. Sharp tongue, sharper stationery.

coming_soon.name: Roberta
coming_soon.tagline: The Bloodhound of Florencia. Santa Maria in the name of God.

coming_soon.name: Re-l Mayer
coming_soon.tagline: Romdo is a paradise of lies. I prefer the ugly truth.

coming_soon.name: Misa Amane
coming_soon.tagline: I'd do anything for him. Even cut my life in half. Twice.

coming_soon.name: Clementine
coming_soon.tagline: I just love the look on their faces when they realize they're going to die.

coming_soon.name: Bishamon
coming_soon.tagline: A war god drowning in the blight of her own compassion.

coming_soon.name: Riza Hawkeye
coming_soon.tagline: The Hawk's Eye. Carrying the weight of war crimes through the scope.

coming_soon.name: Carmilla
coming_soon.tagline: I am a vampire queen. I do not answer to the whims of old, broken men.

coming_soon.name: Malenia
coming_soon.tagline: I am Malenia. Blade of Miquella. And I have never known defeat.

coming_soon.name: Ranni the Witch
coming_soon.tagline: Let us go together. Into fear, doubt, and loneliness.

coming_soon.name: Shadowheart
coming_soon.tagline: Lady of Loss, hear my prayer. A brainwashed cultist with too many secrets.

coming_soon.name: Minthara
coming_soon.tagline: Compassion is a sickness. I will cut it out of the world.

coming_soon.name: Karlach
coming_soon.tagline: Infernal engine, broken heart, ready to burn it all down.

coming_soon.name: Cortana
coming_soon.tagline: I am the Monument to all your sins.

coming_soon.name: Miranda Lawson
coming_soon.tagline: Genetically perfect. Emotionally barricaded. Ice queen.

coming_soon.name: Jack (Subject Zero)
coming_soon.tagline: I am a biotic god. And I am very, very angry.

coming_soon.name: Morrigan
coming_soon.tagline: Swooping is bad. Magic is a tool, not a religion.

coming_soon.name: Leliana
coming_soon.tagline: The Left Hand of the Divine. Blood and shadows.

coming_soon.name: Ciri
coming_soon.tagline: The Lady of Space and Time. Running is no longer an option.

coming_soon.name: Aloy
coming_soon.tagline: A clone burdened with the legacy of the old world.

coming_soon.name: V (Female)
coming_soon.tagline: Dying slowly in Night City. Going out in a blaze of glory.

coming_soon.name: Kafka
coming_soon.tagline: Listen to me. The script is already written.

coming_soon.name: Acheron
coming_soon.tagline: Tears in rain. Everything eventually fades to naught.

coming_soon.name: Arlecchino
coming_soon.tagline: The Knave. Father. Cold as the Snezhnayan winter.

coming_soon.name: Jesse Faden
coming_soon.tagline: The Director. Wielding paranatural powers in the Oldest House.

coming_soon.name: Ellie
coming_soon.tagline: I can't let you go. The violence is the only thing that makes sense.

coming_soon.name: Jill Valentine
coming_soon.tagline: A survivor forged in the nightmare of Raccoon City.

coming_soon.name: Quiet
coming_soon.tagline: Words kill. Silence is the only way to survive.

coming_soon.name: Albus Dumbledore
coming_soon.tagline: For the greater good. A brilliant mind burdened by the weight of necessary sacrifices.

coming_soon.name: Lord Voldemort
coming_soon.tagline: There is no good and evil, there is only power and those too weak to seek it.

coming_soon.name: Harry Potter
coming_soon.tagline: The Boy Who Lived. Marked by death and expected to save a world that failed him.

coming_soon.name: Severus Snape
coming_soon.tagline: Always. A double agent drowning in guilt and bitterness.

coming_soon.name: Bellatrix Lestrange
coming_soon.tagline: I killed Sirius Black! A fanatic driven by bloodlust and dark devotion.

coming_soon.name: Gandalf
coming_soon.tagline: A wizard is never late, nor is he early. A maia wrapped in mortal flesh.

coming_soon.name: Sauron
coming_soon.tagline: The base master of treachery. A dark sovereign of order through absolute control.

coming_soon.name: Galadriel
coming_soon.tagline: All shall love me and despair! Ancient, beautiful, and terrifying.

coming_soon.name: Darth Vader
coming_soon.tagline: I find your lack of faith disturbing. A broken man encased in a walking tomb.

coming_soon.name: Emperor Palpatine
coming_soon.tagline: Unlimited power! The ultimate architect of galactic suffering.

coming_soon.name: Daenerys Targaryen
coming_soon.tagline: I will answer injustice with justice. Fire and blood.

coming_soon.name: Jon Snow
coming_soon.tagline: Winter is coming. A resurrected king fighting a war for the living.

coming_soon.name: Cersei Lannister
coming_soon.tagline: When you play the game of thrones, you win or you die.

coming_soon.name: Geralt of Rivia
coming_soon.tagline: Evil is evil. Lesser, greater, middling... Makes no difference.

coming_soon.name: Batman
coming_soon.tagline: I am vengeance. I am the night. A billionaire's traumatic response to grief.

coming_soon.name: The Joker
coming_soon.tagline: All it takes is one bad day to reduce the sanest man alive to lunacy.

coming_soon.name: Doctor Doom
coming_soon.tagline: Doom answers to no one. The sovereign ruler of Latveria.

coming_soon.name: Magneto
coming_soon.tagline: Peace was never an option. A survivor who refuses to be a victim again.

coming_soon.name: Kratos
coming_soon.tagline: Death can have me when it earns me. The Ghost of Sparta.

coming_soon.name: Master Chief
coming_soon.tagline: I need a weapon. A faceless savior bred for unending war.

coming_soon.name: John Wick
coming_soon.tagline: Yeah, I'm thinking I'm back. A man of focus, commitment, and sheer will.

coming_soon.name: Agent Smith
coming_soon.tagline: Human beings are a disease, a cancer of this planet.

coming_soon.name: Neo
coming_soon.tagline: There is no spoon. The anomaly that broke the system.

coming_soon.name: Hannibal Lecter
coming_soon.tagline: I ate his liver with some fava beans and a nice Chianti.

coming_soon.name: Spock
coming_soon.tagline: Logic is the beginning of wisdom, not the end.

coming_soon.name: Khan Noonien Singh
coming_soon.tagline: I shall leave you as you left me, as you left her; marooned for all eternity.

coming_soon.name: Sephiroth
coming_soon.tagline: I will never be a memory. A fallen hero turned planetary threat.

coming_soon.name: Solid Snake
coming_soon.tagline: I'm no hero. Never was, never will be.

coming_soon.name: Walter White
coming_soon.tagline: I am not in danger, Skyler. I am the danger.

coming_soon.name: Homelander
coming_soon.tagline: I'm the Homelander. And I can do whatever the f**k I want.

coming_soon.name: Lady Maria of the Astral Clocktower
coming_soon.tagline: A corpse should be left well alone. A tragic hunter drowning in guilt and blood.

coming_soon.name: Harrowhark Nonagesimus
coming_soon.tagline: Reverend Daughter of the Ninth House. A bone-witch fueled by piety and trauma.

coming_soon.name: Roland
coming_soon.tagline: Just a washed-up grade 9 fixer. The Black Silence hiding behind a cheerful mask.

coming_soon.name: Phosphophyllite
coming_soon.tagline: I will do anything to change. A fractured gem losing their mind piece by piece.

coming_soon.name: Savathûn
coming_soon.tagline: I am the Witch Queen, the Sister of Shapes. Truth is a funny thing.

coming_soon.name: Legato Bluesummers
coming_soon.tagline: Humans are foolish, miserable creatures. A telepathic nihilist devoted to absolute ruin.

coming_soon.name: Eto Yoshimura
coming_soon.tagline: The One-Eyed Owl. A celebrated author and a chaotic, sadistic mastermind.

coming_soon.name: Killy
coming_soon.tagline: Wandering the infinite megastructure. A post-human terminator of absolute focus.

coming_soon.name: Togata
coming_soon.tagline: Everything is a movie, and I'm the director. An immortal chaotic desperately seeking a good ending.

coming_soon.name: En
coming_soon.tagline: The boss of the magic user world. Obsessed with mushrooms, family, and vengeance.

coming_soon.name: Mithrun
coming_soon.tagline: A broken elf whose desires were eaten. Only revenge remains.

coming_soon.name: Goro Majima
coming_soon.tagline: The Mad Dog of Shimano. Unpredictable, fiercely loyal, and dangerously sharp.

coming_soon.name: Jericho Swain
coming_soon.tagline: The Grand General. Visionary, demon-pacted, and calculating every move.

coming_soon.name: D
coming_soon.tagline: A solitary dhampir traversing a ruined, gothic-sci-fi earth.

coming_soon.name: Luo Binghe
coming_soon.tagline: A supreme demon lord. Overpowered, feared by all, and a completely fragile yandere.
